== Notes for [[Item:Q100564|Q100564]] ==

Bakr Ben Yahia I

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Bakr Ben Yahia I was possibly a son of Yahia Ben Yahi III and the father of Yahia Ben Bakr. He was, apparently, the first of his branch of the family to become a Christian and thus a Mozarab (Iberian Christian living under Muslim domination), since his father was still and always a Jew and his son was always mentioned as being a Christian.[1]

Bakr Ben Yahia's greatgrandson, Aloandro Ben Bekar, Governor of Faro, would see his daughter Madragana become a mistress to king Afonso III of Portugal, and ancestor of many celebrities.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD86AEA61EFBBFA9822EF79916CD6F3
geni:6000000000031549680

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]]
[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]][[Category:Pages]]
